description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a glossy black finish and a contoured, double-cutaway body shape. The front features a large, silver pickguard with multiple control knobs and three single-coil pickups, suggesting a versatile tonal range. The neck is long and slender, with a dark fretboard and dot inlays, leading to a headstock with six inline tuning pegs. The back of the guitar is smooth and unadorned, highlighting the ergonomic curves for comfortable play. Chrome hardware is visible, including the bridge, pickup covers, and control knobs, adding a touch of contrast to the predominantly black body. The overall design is modern and stylish, suitable for both stage performance and urban street music settings.
description: Glossy black electric guitar with a contoured double-cutaway body, silver pickguard, and chrome hardware. Features three pickups, multiple control knobs, and a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the guitar's slim body thickness and the protruding control knobs and bridge.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the smooth, contoured back and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile highlighting the body thickness and the edge of the pickguard and hardware.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the black body, silver pickguard, three pickups, control knobs, and the full neck with headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a classic Rickenbacker contour.
